volume_info.title: Digital Color Science & Brand Integrity
volume_info.description: Advanced color theory and post-processing protocols for Cortex Media.

color_physics.color_space: ACES (Academy Color Encoding System) - Workflow Reference

color_profiles.name: Cinematic Teal & Orange (High-End)
color_profiles.logic: Complementary Contrast: Orange highlights (metal/skin) vs Deep Teal shadows.
color_profiles.visual_impact: Adds depth and expensive cinematic feel.

color_profiles.name: Industrial Silver & Steel
color_profiles.logic: Monochromatic focus with emphasis on metallic reflections and high-frequency textures.
color_profiles.visual_impact: Professional, clean, and clinical. Perfect for chemical/oil industry.

color_profiles.name: Vibrant Commercial Gloss
color_profiles.logic: True-to-life colors, white balance perfection, and high micro-contrast.

brand_consistency_protocol.instruction: Maintain absolute color accuracy for brand logos. No color shifting allowed on primary brand assets.

post_processing_engine.sharpening_logic: Unsharp Mask: Radius 1.0, Amount 50% (Avoid AI haloing).
